mapper.insert: insert into lego_vector_store_profiles (id, name, vector_store_kind, vector_store_config, embedding_model_id, embedding_dims, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{vectorStoreKind}, cast(#{vectorStoreConfigJson} as jsonb), #{embeddingModelId}, #{embeddingDims}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select id, name, vector_store_kind, vector_store_config::text as vector_store_config_json, embedding_model_id, embedding_dims, created_at, updated_at from lego_vector_store_profiles where id = #{id}

select id, name, vector_store_kind, vector_store_config::text as vector_store_config_json, embedding_model_id, embedding_dims, created_at, updated_at from lego_vector_store_profiles order by created_at desc
mapper.update: update lego_vector_store_profiles set name = #{name}, vector_store_kind = #{vectorStoreKind}, vector_store_config = cast(#{vectorStoreConfigJson} as jsonb), embedding_model_id = #{embeddingModelId}, embedding_dims = #{embeddingDims}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
